info.name: Futbol API
info.description:
A comprehensive REST API for managing football (soccer) data including teams, countries, organizations, venues, and more.

This API provides endpoints for managing football-related entities with full CRUD operations, advanced filtering, and pagination support.


Contact Support:
 Name: Eagle Team
